_comment: Per-case mount layout. The runner reads this to construct the session_resources array. file_id_param values are CLI handles; runner --file <param>=<file_id> swaps in concrete IDs (or uses the captured POC defaults).

files.mount_path: input/tafi_2025/Borrador de EF 2025 - Financiera Tafi - MICI.pdf
files.description: Tafi 2025 financial statement PDF (captured from POC)
Tafi cumulative loan portfolio CSV (captured from POC)

_note_on_mount_paths: Per sessions-expert.md: mount_path values for type=file resources are auto-prefixed with /mnt/session/uploads/. So the PDF lands at /mnt/session/uploads/input/tafi_2025/... — the kickoff prompts must reference that absolute path.
